_comment: Maps a product name (the letter's `detail` when monetise === 'product') to its Stripe checkout and a short blurb. Seed checkout_url values are STRIPE_CHECKOUT_PENDING placeholders. Replace each with the live Stripe Checkout link before enabling live sends. The '[Get it]' marker in a letter P.S. is rewritten by render.js into a link to checkout_url.

Filler-Word Killer Editor Pack.blurb: Flags all 50 filler words in your draft so you can strike them in one pass.

How to Earn $3-5k Writing Online.blurb: A course that walks you through building a paid writing income, step by step.

The Fearless Creative.blurb: The nudge that gets you to pick one project and start.

Claude Code for Writers.blurb: Go past templates and actually build with AI.

The Zettelkasten for Creators Kit.blurb: The system for connecting scattered notes into essays, articles, and books.

Writers' Deadline Database.blurb: Every writing grant and contest deadline worth chasing, in one place.

Prompt / Word-Bank Pack.blurb: A bank of prompts and words to break a blank page open.
